data.name: Married Life With A Lamia
data.detailed_description:
Did you ever wondered how your life would be with a monster girl wife? Now it’s time to experience it.

Married Life With A Lamia is a relationship building 2D Hentai game.

Build a life with your tempting lamia wife. earn her love and she’ll reward you with steamy, unforgettable pleasures.

Spend your day and night together with your new wife, each day is a nice and cozy experience. Grow closer to your and savor every moment. whether it’s sweet, playful, or passionately intense.

Everyone has their own tastes. all you need to do is ask her and you will be wrapped between her fingers or coils in no time.

Summary:
Interact with your lamia wife daily, do tasks to earn money. spend the coins you’ve earned to buy content from the shop, enjoy your purchased content while progressing in the story based on your relationship level.

Did the description awaken your horny curiosity? If so, make sure to add the game to your wishlist so you’ll know exactly when it’s time to play with your lamia wife.

data.short_description: Build a life with your tempting lamia wife. earn her love and she’ll reward you with steamy, unforgettable pleasures.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • 儲存空間: 450 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x720 the Game default Display
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows® 8.1/10 (64bit)
  • Processor: Intel Core i3-4340 or better
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Compatible OpenGL / VRAM 1GB or better
  • Storage: 450 MB available space
  • Additional Notes: 1280x720 the Game default Display
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
